name: ZATCA Advance Tax Invoice
html:
ZATCA Advance Tax Invoice
فاتورة ضريبية لدفعة مقدمة
Invoice No. {{ doc.name }} Invoice Type Code {{ doc.invoice_type_code or "386" }}
Posting Date {{ doc.posting_date }} ZATCA UUID {{ doc.zatca_uuid or "" }}
Payment Entry {{ doc.payment_entry or "" }} ZATCA Status {{ doc.zatca_status or "" }}
Parties / الأطراف
Supplier / البائع Customer / العميل
English: {{ doc.company_name or doc.company }}
Arabic: {{ doc.company_name_arabic or "" }}
VAT: {{ doc.company_vat_number or "" }}
Address: {{ doc.company_address_line1 or "" }} {{ doc.company_address_line2 or "" }}
City: {{ doc.company_city or "" }}
Postal Code: {{ doc.company_postal_code or "" }}
Country: {{ doc.company_country_code or doc.company_country or "" }} 		English: {{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer }}
Arabic: {{ doc.customer_name_arabic or "" }}
VAT: {{ doc.customer_vat_number or "" }}
Address: {{ doc.customer_address_line1 or "" }} {{ doc.customer_address_line2 or "" }}
City: {{ doc.customer_city or "" }}
Postal Code: {{ doc.customer_postal_code or "" }}
Country: {{ doc.customer_country_code or doc.customer_country or "" }}
Amounts / المبالغ
Description Taxable Amount VAT % VAT Amount Total
{{ doc.description or "Advance Payment" }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.taxable_amount or 0) }} {{ doc.currency }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.tax_rate or 0) }}% {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.tax_amount or 0) }} {{ doc.currency }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.total_amount or 0) }} {{ doc.currency }}
Total in Words {{ doc.in_words or "" }}
Company Currency Total {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.base_total_amount or 0) }} {{ doc.company_currency or doc.currency }}
Company Currency In Words {{ doc.base_in_words or "" }}
{% if doc.terms %}
Terms and Conditions / الشروط والأحكام
{{ doc.terms }}
{% endif %}
This print format is for the ZATCA Advance Tax Invoice record generated from Payment Entry.
